{{InfoboxProject
|project=The Portal Essay Club
|image=
|topic=
|leader=
|startdate=
|customlabel1=
|customdata1=
|customlabel2=
|customdata2=
|customlabel3=
|customdata3=
|customlabel4=
|customdata4=
|link1title=
|link1=
|link2title=
|link2=
|link3title=
|link3=
|link4title=
|link4=
}}
The Portal Essay Club carefully collects and curates essays related to the ideas expressed in [[The Portal Podcast]]. It was formed in response to podcast [[40: Introducing The Portal Essay Club - What if everyone is simply insane?|Episode 40]], where [[Eric Weinstein|Eric]] reads the essay The Nightmare that is a Reality by Arthur Koestler.

Essays are an upgrade from informal messaging without the commitment required by a book. Gathering high quality essays will facilitate the clear communication of ideas and foster stronger discussions in the Portal community. Additionally, essays can easily serve as the focus of microsites, such as https://wethescreamers.com which was also created in response to [[40: Introducing The Portal Essay Club - What if everyone is simply insane?|Episode 40]].

== Essays ==
* The Nightmare that is a Reality - Arthur Koestler in the New York Times, 1944
* [https://blogs.scientificamerican.com/guest-blog/the-evolution-of-the-physicists-picture-of-nature/ The Evolution of the Physicist's Picture of Nature] - Paul Dirac in Scientific American, 1963

== Members ==
* Aardvark

{{Stub}}

__NOTOC__
[[Category:Projects]]
[[Category:Requested Project]]
[[Category:Community]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
